name: Brichi Quest
short_description: One day, Brichi finds a mysterious sword that suddenly transports him to an unknown land. He needs to search every island and dungeon in search of an opportunity to return home. Many dangers and obstacles await him along the way. Embark on this adventure and see it all for yourself!
detailed_description:
Brichi is our hero!
One day he finds a mysterious sword that suddenly transports him to an unknown land. Seven unique islands that need to be connected by bridges.
Brichi will have to explore this archipelago, full of mysteries and secrets. He needs to search every island and dungeon in search of an opportunity to return home. Many dangers and obstacles await him along the way. But behind every challenge, a treasure chest awaits him!
What can be stored inside each such chest? A powerful artifact? New weapon? Apples? Or a cute girlfriend in a witch hat?
Embark on this adventure and see it all for yourself!
But be careful, Brichi can’t swim, avoid the water!
Good luck!

supported_languages: English, Ukrainian, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Korean, Polish, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America
